'''kobayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glaciohydrological|glaciohydrological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glaciohydrological|glaciohydrological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kobayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kobayithi|kobayithi]] || [[word:kobayiji|kobayiji]] || [[word:kobayishi|kobayishi]] || [[word:kobayiki|kobayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kobayuthuthu|kobayuthuthu]] || [[word:kobayujuju|kobayujuju]] || [[word:kobayushushu|kobayushushu]] || [[word:kobayukuku|kobayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kobayuthu|kobayuthu]] || [[word:kobayuju|kobayuju]] || [[word:kobayushu|kobayushu]] || [[word:kobayuku|kobayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kobayufthuf|kobayufthuf]] || [[word:kobayufjuf|kobayufjuf]] || [[word:kobayufshuf|kobayufshuf]] || [[word:kobayufkuf|kobayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kobayethe|kobayethe]] || [[word:kobayeje|kobayeje]] || [[word:kobayeshe|kobayeshe]] || [[word:kobayeke|kobayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kobayothotho|kobayothotho]] || [[word:kobayojojo|kobayojojo]] || [[word:kobayoshosho|kobayoshosho]] || [[word:kobayokoko|kobayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kobayotho|kobayotho]] || [[word:kobayojo|kobayojo]] || [[word:kobayosho|kobayosho]] || [[word:kobayoko|kobayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kobayofthof|kobayofthof]] || [[word:kobayofjof|kobayofjof]] || [[word:kobayofshof|kobayofshof]] || [[word:kobayofkof|kobayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfthĂŻf|kobayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfjĂŻf|kobayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfshĂŻf|kobayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfkĂŻf|kobayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kobayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kobayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kobayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kobayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfthĂŻf|kobayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfjĂŻf|kobayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfshĂŻf|kobayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfkĂŻf|kobayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfthĂŻf|kobayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfjĂŻf|kobayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfshĂŻf|kobayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kobayĂŻfkĂŻf|kobayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kobayĂŠthĂŠ|kobayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kobayĂŠjĂŠ|kobayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kobayĂŠshĂŠ|kobayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kobayĂŠkĂŠ|kobayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kobayathatha|kobayathatha]] || [[word:kobayajaja|kobayajaja]] || [[word:kobayashasha|kobayashasha]] || [[word:kobayakaka|kobayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kobayatha|kobayatha]] || [[word:kobayaja|kobayaja]] || [[word:kobayasha|kobayasha]] || [[word:kobayaka|kobayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kobayafthaf|kobayafthaf]] || [[word:kobayafjaf|kobayafjaf]] || [[word:kobayafshaf|kobayafshaf]] || [[word:kobayafkaf|kobayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kobayasha|kobayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kobayshĂ«sha|kobayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kobayrosha|kobayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kobaymusha|kobaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kobayasha|kobayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokobaynkshĂ«sha|gokobaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokobaynkrosha|gokobaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokobaynkmusha|gokobaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokobaynkyasha|gokobaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kobabayasha|kobabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kobabayshĂ«sha|kobabayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kobabayrosha|kobabayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kobabaymusha|kobabaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kobabayasha|kobabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokobabaynkshĂ«sha|gokobabaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokobabaynkrosha|gokobabaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokobabaynkmusha|gokobabaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokobabaynkyasha|gokobabaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kebĂŠyasha|kebĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kebĂŠyshĂ«sha|kebĂŠyshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kebĂŠyrosha|kebĂŠyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kebĂŠymusha|kebĂŠymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kebĂŠyasha|kebĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokebĂŠynkshĂ«sha|gokebĂŠynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokebĂŠynkrosha|gokebĂŠynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokebĂŠynkmusha|gokebĂŠynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokebĂŠynkyasha|gokebĂŠynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kobfayasha|kobfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kobfayshĂ«sha|kobfayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kobfayrosha|kobfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kobfaymusha|kobfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kobfayasha|kobfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokobfaynkshĂ«sha|gokobfaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokobfaynkrosha|gokobfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokobfaynkmusha|gokobfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokobfaynkyasha|gokobfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
